payload.body:
Implementation handoff:

- Completed: opening an unread inbox entry now triggers the existing `inbox.markRead` mutation before navigating to the issue detail.
- Completed: already-read entries do not produce a mark-read mutation.
- Completed: added focused renderer tests for unread-to-read and already-read open behavior.
- Branch: `ticket/UKN-66FC7-inbox-read`
- Commit: `5a2e19f2a` (`Mark inbox items read when opened`)
- Remote: `origin/ticket/UKN-66FC7-inbox-read`
- Tests: `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck`; `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop exec vitest run test/renderer-inbox-open.test.ts test/renderer-inbox-query.test.ts`; `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop test`; touched-file `oxfmt --check`; touched-file `oxlint`.
- Note: repo-wide `pnpm format:check -- ...` checked the whole repo and reported unrelated pre-existing formatting issues in `.vscode/settings.json`, `packages/agents/src/runtime/policy.ts`, `packages/api/src/http/middleware/CycleRequestContextMiddleware.ts`, and `packages/api/src/http/schemas/AgentTaskResourceEnvelope.ts`; touched files pass direct `oxfmt --check`.
